name: Fortigate Digitro
summary: Configurações dos logs de firewall da Digitro
description: Incluir streams, dashboards, geoip, pipelines  e extractors

parameters.name: lookup_file_path_asn
parameters.title: Database file path ASN
parameters.description: Endereço de onde estão os arquivos mmdb da base GeoIP. Contém os dados de ASN. Download em: https://download.maxmind.com/geoip/databases

description.@value: Threat Intelligence Lookup in fortigate: dstip

source.@value:
rule "Threat Lookup in fortigate: dstip"
when
 has_field("dstip")
then
 set_fields(threat_intel_lookup_ip(to_string($message.dstip), "dstip"));
end

description.@value: Dashboards for analyzing Application Control, DNS Filtering, Forward Traffic, IPS, Local Traffic, Multicast Traffic, SSL/TLS/SSH Inspection, VPN, and Web Filtering logs

widget.69f08b3f-64f8-4919-a2f4-b664b7e16fa1: Src IPs na linha do tempo

description.@value: Threat Intelligence Lookup in fortigate: remip

source.@value:
rule "Threat Lookup in fortigate: remip"
when
 has_field("remip")
then
 set_fields(threat_intel_lookup_ip(to_string($message.dstip), "remip"));
end

rule "Threat Lookup in fortigate: srcip"
when
 has_field("srcip")
then
 set_fields(threat_intel_lookup_ip(to_string($message.srcip), "srcip"));
end

description.@value: Altera timestamp e adiciona informações de GeoIP ao Fortigate

source.@value:
pipeline "Preprocess Fortigate"
stage 0 match either
stage 1 match either
rule "fortigate timestamp"
rule "fortigate-esp timestamp"
stage 2 match all
rule "GeoIP Lookup:dstip"
rule "GeoIP Lookup:remip"
rule "GeoIP Lookup:srcip"
rule "RFC 1918 dstip"
rule "RFC 1918 srcip"
end

description.@value: Detecta IPs internos para o campo srcip

source.@value:
rule "RFC 1918 srcip"
when
    // only process events with a srcip field
    has_field("srcip")
    AND
    // check if rfc1918, only one of these must be true
    ( 
        cidr_match("10.0.0.0/8", to_ip($message.srcip))
        OR
        cidr_match("172.16.0.0/12", to_ip($message.srcip))
        OR
        cidr_match("192.168.0.0/16", to_ip($message.srcip))
        OR
        cidr_match("127.0.0.0/8", to_ip($message.srcip))
    )
then
	set_field("srcip_is_internal", true);
end

query.query_string: subtype:vpn AND action:tunnel\-down AND NOT msg:/.*IPsec.*/ AND _exists_:tunnelip AND reason:"Lost the connection"

source.@value:
rule "Threat Lookup in fortigate: hostname"
when
 has_field("hostname")
then
 set_fields(threat_intel_lookup_domain(to_string($message.hostname), "hostname"));
end

description.@value: Tentativa de DDoS nos servidor de VPN do NOC

query.@value: subtype:vpn AND action:tunnel\-down AND NOT msg:/.*IPsec.*/ AND _exists_:tunnelip AND reason:"Lost the connection"

description.@value: Envia alerta quando houver mais de 5 quedas da VPN SSL por motivo de "Lost the connection" nos últimos 2 minutos em 1 operadora
Muda timestamp do FG de SP
Verifica se o volume de tráfego nos últimos 10min é maior que 1MM

query.@value: subtype:forward AND NOT srcip_is_internal:true AND srcintfrole:wan AND NOT action:deny

description.@value:
Gera um evento quando mais de 50% das mensagens do stream Fortigate vêm de um mesmo ASN.

Adicionado no filtro  !action=deny  para só atuar se o tráfego tiver sendo liberado.
Detecta IPs internos para o campo dstip

source.@value:
rule "RFC 1918 dstip"
when
    // only process events with a dstip field
    has_field("dstip")
    AND
    // check if rfc1918, only one of these must be true
    ( 
        cidr_match("10.0.0.0/8", to_ip($message.dstip))
        OR
        cidr_match("172.16.0.0/12", to_ip($message.dstip))
        OR
        cidr_match("192.168.0.0/16", to_ip($message.dstip))
        OR
        cidr_match("127.0.0.0/8", to_ip($message.dstip))
    )
then
	set_field("dstip_is_internal", true);
end

description.@value: Envia por email o evento para report.syslog@digitro.com
